title: capnoides uralensis
intro: Capnoides uralensis, also known as Ural capnoides or Ural capnos, is a plant species in the caprifoliaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Capnoides uralensis is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, and its leaves are sometimes used in traditional herbal remedies.
